title: Bubbly Clean Hands
lesson: Washing your hands keeps germs away and keeps you healthy.
prompts: In a bright sunny garden — leafy green plants, warm natural sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image plays happily on the grass with a small toy spade, hands a little muddy, with a cheerful smile. Medium shot at eye level, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

A scene just inside a bright home doorway leading toward the kitchen before a snack. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands in the mid-ground, with slightly muddy hands held up and a curious, uncertain expression. In the foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_PARENT} kneels gently and points toward a bathroom sink down the hall, with a patient, guiding smile. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm indoor light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a bright home bathroom — a sink with running water, light tiles — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands alone at the sink, stepping up onto a small step stool and reaching for a colourful bar of soap, a bottle of hand soap on the counter, with a curious smile. Medium shot at eye level, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a bright home bathroom — a sink with running water, light tiles — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands alone at the sink, upright and turned slightly to one side, rubbing two soapy hands together with lots of fluffy white bubbles, the hands held off to one side at chest height so they do not cover the face, with a delighted, giggling smile. Only this one child is at the sink, alone in the frame, with no second child, twin, sibling or reflection anywhere. Medium shot at eye level, sparkling bubbles, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a bright home bathroom — a sink with running water, light tiles — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands alone at the sink, holding up freshly rinsed clean hands under the running tap, hands held to one side so they do not cover the face, with a proud, beaming smile. Medium shot at eye level, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

A warm scene at a sunny kitchen table set for a snack. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits, with a happy smile, clean hands resting beside a plate of fruit. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_PARENT} sits across the table, passing over a piece of fruit and looking on with a warm, approving smile. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. Eye-level medium-wide shot, cheerful morning light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}
gists: In a bright sunny garden, the child plays alone on the grass with a toy spade, hands a little muddy, cheerful.
Just inside a bright home doorway, the child holds up slightly muddy hands while the mother kneels pointing toward the bathroom sink — time to wash up before a snack.
In a bright home bathroom, the child stands alone at the sink, stepping up on a stool and reaching for soap, curious.
In the bathroom, the child stands alone at the sink rubbing two soapy hands together with lots of fluffy bubbles, delighted — only one child, no twin or reflection.
In the bathroom, the child stands alone holding up freshly rinsed clean hands under the tap, proud.
At a sunny kitchen table set for a snack, the child sits with clean hands beside a plate of fruit while the mother passes over a piece of fruit — clean hands, happy snack.
texts: {NAME} played outside in the garden, digging in the dirt. "What fun!" said {NAME}. But oh — {NAME}'s hands got all muddy.
"Time for a snack — but first, wash your hands," said Mum, pointing toward the sink. "Okay, Mum!" said {NAME}, hurrying inside.
{NAME} climbed up on the little stool and reached for the soap. Twist, twist — on came the water. "Here we go!" said {NAME}.
{NAME} rubbed both hands together and made lots of fluffy bubbles. "Scrub-a-dub-dub!" giggled {NAME}. So many bubbles!
Then {NAME} rinsed all the bubbles away. "Squeaky clean!" said {NAME}, holding both hands up high, so proud.
{NAME} sat down for a snack with clean, happy hands. "No more germs — hooray!" said {NAME}. "Well washed!" said Mum, passing a piece of fruit.
